fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: From Dropbox App Console -> Generate Access Token (or use OAuth flow)

healthcheck_config.description: Validates access token via Dropbox current account endpoint

resources.label: Folders (root)
resources.description: Top-level folders in the user's Dropbox. Scope a credential so an agent can't read or write outside the chosen folders.

metadata.summary: Dropbox cloud storage for file sync, sharing, and collaboration.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to dropbox.com/developers/apps
2. Click 'Create app' or select an existing app
3. Under the 'Settings' tab, find 'Generated access token'
4. Click 'Generate' and copy the sl.u... token
5. Paste the access token here
